name: bandit.extortion_first_demand_pay_tight_delayed_ocr_mcw
description: TIGHT Slice 1 proof with a delayed no-input prompt capture before Pay, to avoid giving credit when the prompt has not visibly rendered yet.

steps.label: post_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the McWilliams bandit local-contact fixture before toll-control proof begins; this is startup/load footing only

steps.label: advance_299_turns_to_gate_edge
steps.expected_immediate_state: bounded turn advance reaches the shakedown gate edge; proof is deferred to the same-run demand-surface artifact after the final turn

steps.label: advance_final_turn_to_first_shakedown
steps.expected_visible_fact: Bandit shakedown dialogue window is visible with the basecamp-pressure opening and player-facing Pay/Fight choices after the final local-contact turn
steps.abort_reason: tight proof requires a visible Pay/Fight-only prompt before selecting Pay; OCR either missed Pay/Fight or saw a forbidden third/conversation action
steps.expected_immediate_state: final turn reaches the shakedown prompt input context; immediate capture is diagnostic only, and a separate delayed no-input capture must prove visible Pay/Fight before Pay is pressed

steps.label: delayed_prompt_visible_pay_fight_before_selection
steps.expected_visible_fact: No input has been sent after the shakedown opened; the rendered demand prompt is visible and offers exactly Pay/Fight before choosing Pay.
steps.expected_immediate_state: delayed no-input capture/OCR should show visible Pay/Fight prompt before the Pay key is sent; missing OCR is no-credit but the packet continues to capture the post-Pay state
steps.abort_reason: tight proof requires delayed pre-selection screenshot/OCR to show Pay/Fight only; OCR missed it or saw a forbidden third/conversation action

steps.label: audit_first_demand_surface_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove the bandit camp-style local gate and pay/fight shakedown surface with reachable goods and demanded toll
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names camp_style profile, open_shakedown posture, reachable goods, demanded toll, visible Pay/Fight responses, and the NPC trade UI payment bridge

steps.label: choose_pay
steps.expected_visible_fact: Pay was selected from the visible bandit shakedown dialogue; the actual NPC trade UI / trade window is now open with Pay: debt before any hidden surrender.
steps.abort_reason: tight proof requires the immediate post-Pay screenshot/OCR to show the real trade/payment window, not a silent/stub/failure state

steps.label: audit_trade_ui_opened_artifact
steps.abort_reason: tight proof requires same-run log evidence that Pay fired npc_trading::trade with demanded/reachable values and player/NPC/scene pool components
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names the actual NPC trade API, Pay: debt title, demanded/reachable values, and the honest pool components: player carried, nearby NPC/faction, and scene/basecamp goods

evidence_contract.claim: tight current-build proof packet with a delayed no-input pre-Pay OCR checkpoint, immediate post-Pay trade-window OCR, and same-run callback/pool artifact; missing delayed prompt OCR remains no-credit
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / no Slice 1 credit
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No Slice 1 credit unless current binary is proven, before-Pay OCR shows Pay/Fight and no forbidden third/conversation actions, after-Pay OCR shows the real trade window, and the same-run artifact proves npc_trading::trade with player/NPC/scene pool components.
